2022-23 Cincinnati Bearcats Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 23-13 (11-7, 4th in AAC MBB)

Coach: Wes Miller

PS/G: 77.1 (54th of 363)

PA/G: 69.3 (150th of 363)

SRS: 11.77 (49th of 363)

SOS: 4.97 (88th of 363)

ORtg: 109.6 (59th of 363)

DRtg: 98.5 (91st of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +25000
